description: Merkle root relayed from Ethereum to Polygon with age of 1800 seconds (30 minutes), which is within the maxRootAge threshold of 3600 seconds (1 hour). The verifier should accept this proof since the root is still fresh.

metadata.notes: rootAge=1800s < maxRootAge=3600s. Chain ID 0x89 = 137 (Polygon). Root freshness check passes.
